app.auth-servers.unreachable.body.message: Minecraft authentication servers may be down right now. Check your internet connection and try again later.

app.update-toast.body.message: Revoria v{version} is ready to install! Reload to update now, or automatically when you close Revoria.

app.update-toast.body.download-complete.message: Revoria v{version} has finished downloading. Reload to update now, or automatically when you close Revoria.

app.update-toast.body.metered.message: Revoria v{version} is available now! Since you're on a metered network, we didn't automatically download it.

settings.appearance.advanced-rendering.d.message: Enables advanced rendering such as blur effects that may cause performance issues without hardware-accelerated rendering.

settings.appearance.color-theme.descript.message: Select your preferred color theme for Modrinth App.

settings.appearance.default-landing.desc.message: Change the page to which the launcher opens on.

settings.appearance.hide-nametag.descrip.message: Disables the nametag above your player on the skins page.

settings.appearance.jump-back.descriptio.message: Includes recent worlds in the "Jump back in" section on the Home page.

settings.appearance.launcher-language.de.message: Select the language used by Revoria UI.

settings.appearance.minimize-launcher.de.message: Minimize the launcher when a Minecraft process starts.

settings.appearance.native-decorations.d.message: Use system window frame (app restart required).

settings.appearance.toggle-sidebar.descr.message: Enables the ability to toggle the sidebar.

settings.default-instance.fullscreen.des.message: Overwrites the options.txt file to start in full screen when launched.

settings.default-instance.width.descript.message: The width of the game window when launched.

settings.default-instance.height.descrip.message: The height of the game window when launched.

settings.default-instance.memory-allocat.message: The memory allocated to each instance when it is ran.

settings.default-instance.pre-launch.des.message: Ran before the instance is launched.

settings.privacy.personalized-ads.descri.message: Modrinth's ad provider, Aditude, shows ads based on your preferences. By disabling this option, you opt out and ads will no longer be shown based on your interests.

settings.privacy.telemetry.description.message: Modrinth collects anonymized analytics and usage data to improve our user experience and customize your experience. By disabling this option, you opt out and your data will no longer be collected.

settings.privacy.discord-rpc.description.message: Manages the Discord Rich Presence integration. Disabling this will cause 'Modrinth' to no longer show up as a game or app you are using on your Discord profile.

settings.privacy.discord-rpc.note.message: Note: This will not prevent any instance-specific Discord Rich Presence integrations, such as those added by mods. (app restart required to take effect)

settings.resource.app-directory.descript.message: The directory where the launcher stores all of its files. Changes will be applied after restarting the launcher.

settings.resource.purge-cache.confirm.ti.message: Are you sure you want to purge the cache?

settings.resource.purge-cache.confirm.de.message: If you proceed, your entire cache will be purged. This may slow down the app temporarily.

settings.resource.app-cache.description.message: The Modrinth app stores a cache of data to speed up loading. This can be purged to force the app to reload data. This may slow down the app temporarily.

settings.resource.max-concurrent-downloa.message: The maximum amount of files the launcher can download at the same time. Set this to a lower value if you have a poor internet connection. (app restart required to take effect)

settings.resource.max-concurrent-writes..message: The maximum amount of files the launcher can write to the disk at once. Set this to a lower value if you are frequently getting I/O errors. (app restart required to take effect)

app.account.sign-in.message: Sign in to a Modrinth account

app.survey.body.message: Would you mind answering a few questions about your experience with Modrinth App?

app.survey.body.secondary.message: This feedback will go directly to the Modrinth team and help guide future updates!

instance.logs.crash.description.message: Analyzes this instance’s crash logs via the Ollama cloud model.

instance.logs.crash.fail.message: Failed to get a response from the model.

instance.logs.crash.api-tutorial.title.message: How to get an Ollama API key:

instance.logs.crash.api-tutorial.step3.message: Click Add API Key, copy it, and paste it into the API key field above.

instance.logs.share.text.message: Check out this log from an instance on the Modrinth App

app.update.complete-toast.text.message: Click here to view the changelog.

app.revoria-update.body.message: Revoria v{latestVersion} is out on GitHub. You are currently on v{currentVersion}.

friends.add-friend.username.description.message: It may be different from their Minecraft username!

friends.add-friends-to-share.message: <link>Add friends</link> to see what they're playing!

friends.sign-in-to-add-friends.message: <link>Sign in to a Modrinth account</link> to add friends and see what they're playing!

instance.settings.tabs.general.delete.de.message: Permanently deletes an instance from your device, including your worlds, configs, and all installed content. Be careful, as once you delete a instance there is no way to recover it.

instance.settings.tabs.general.duplicate.message: Creates a copy of this instance, including worlds, configs, mods, etc.

instance.settings.tabs.general.library-g.message: Library groups allow you to organize your instances into different sections in your library.

instance.settings.tabs.hooks.description.message: Hooks allow advanced users to run certain system commands before and after launching the game.

instance.settings.tabs.hooks.pre-launch..message: Ran before the instance is launched.

instance.settings.tabs.installation.no-c.message: Cannot fetch linked modpack details. Please check your internet connection.

instance.settings.tabs.installation.no-l.message: {loader} is not available for Minecraft {version}. Try another mod loader.

instance.settings.tabs.installation.no-m.message: This instance is linked to a modpack, but the modpack could not be found on Modrinth.

instance.settings.tabs.installation.rein.message: Reinstalling will reset all installed or modified content to what is provided by the modpack, removing any mods or content you have added on top of the original installation. This may fix unexpected behavior if changes have been made to the instance, but if your worlds now depend on additional installed content, it may break existing worlds.
Are you sure you want to reinstall this instance?
Resets the instance's content to its original state, removing any mods or content you have added on top of the original modpack.

instance.settings.tabs.installation.repa.message: Repairing reinstalls Minecraft dependencies and checks for corruption. This may resolve issues if your game is not launching due to launcher-related errors, but will not resolve issues or crashes related to installed mods.

instance.settings.tabs.installation.unli.message: If you proceed, you will not be able to re-link it without creating an entirely new instance. You will no longer receive modpack updates and it will become a normal.
Are you sure you want to unlink this instance?
This instance is linked to a modpack, which means mods can't be updated and you can't change the mod loader or Minecraft version. Unlinking will permanently disconnect this instance from the modpack.

instance.settings.tabs.window.fullscreen.message: Make the game start in full screen when launched (using options.txt).

instance.settings.tabs.window.height.des.message: The height of the game window when launched.

instance.settings.tabs.window.width.desc.message: The width of the game window when launched.

instance.worlds.no_server_quick_play.message: You can only jump straight into servers on Minecraft Alpha 1.0.5+

instance.worlds.no_singleplayer_quick_pl.message: You can only jump straight into singleplayer worlds on Minecraft 1.20+

search.filter.locked.instance-game-versi.message: Game version is provided by the instance

search.filter.locked.instance-loader.tit.message: Loader is provided by the instance

browse.offline.message: You are currently offline. Connect to the internet to browse Modrinth!

browse.error.no-files-available.message: No files available for this project.

browse.notification.curseforge-manual-do.message: CurseForge could not provide a direct download. Opened the project page in your browser.

browse.notification.curseforge-blocked-a.message: CurseForge blocked automated download for this file (403). Opened the project page in your browser.

instance.worlds.remove-server.title.message: Are you sure you want to remove {name}?

instance.worlds.remove-server.descriptio.message: '{name}'{address} will be removed from your list, including in-game, and there will be no way to recover it.

instance.worlds.delete-world.title.message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this world?

instance.worlds.delete-world.description.message: '{name}' will be permanently deleted, and there will be no way to recover it.

instance.worlds.empty.message: You don't have any worlds yet.

skins.rate-limit.skin.message: You're changing your skin too frequently. Mojang's servers have temporarily blocked further requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.

skins.rate-limit.cape.message: You're changing your cape too frequently. Mojang's servers have temporarily blocked further requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.

skins.delete.confirm.title.message: Are you sure you want to delete this skin?

skins.delete.confirm.description.message: This will permanently delete the selected skin. This action cannot be undone.

skins.tooltip.overriding-default-cape.message: The equipped skin is overriding the default cape.

skins.sign-in.description.message: Please sign into your Minecraft account to use the skin management features of the Modrinth app.

maintenance.section.memory-manager.descr.message: Scans instances and helps clear safe junk fast.

maintenance.rules.description.message: Paths are relative to the instance folder. Separate multiple paths with commas.

maintenance.delete-instance.description.message: All data will be removed and cannot be recovered.

project.load-error.message: Project data couldn't not be loaded.

project.notification.curseforge-manual-d.message: CurseForge could not provide a direct download. Opened the project page in your browser.

project.notification.curseforge-blocked-.message: CurseForge blocked automated download for this file (403). Opened the project page in your browser.

skins.upload.drag-or-browse.message: Drag and drop or click here to browse

skins.upload.error.failed-to-read-droppe.message: Failed to read the dropped file.

instance.create.warning.select-game-vers.message: Select a game version before you select a loader version

instance.create.hint.drag-drop-mrpack.message: Or drag and drop your .mrpack file

skins.make-edit-first.message: Make an edit to the skin first!

maintenance.cleanup.no-targets.message: No cleanup files found for the selected rules.

error-modal.title.unable-sign-in.message: Unable to sign in to Minecraft

error-modal.minecraft-auth.network-text-.message: It looks like there were issues with Revoria connecting to Microsoft's servers. This is often the result of a poor connection, so we recommend trying again to see if it works. If issues continue to persist, follow the steps in

error-modal.minecraft-auth.hosts-text-st.message: The Revoria launcher tried to connect to Microsoft / Xbox / Minecraft services, but the remote server rejected the connection. This may indicate that these services are blocked by the hosts file. Please visit

error-modal.minecraft-auth.hosts-text-en.message: for steps on how to fix the issue.

error-modal.minecraft-auth.try-another-t.message: Double check you've signed in with the right account. You may own Minecraft on a different Microsoft account.

error-modal.minecraft-auth.game-pass-hea.message: Using PC Game Pass, coming from Bedrock, or just bought the game?

error-modal.minecraft-auth.game-pass-tex.message: first. Once you're done, come back here and sign in!

error-modal.directory-read-only-text.message: It looks like Revoria is unable to write to the directory you selected. Please adjust the permissions of the directory and try again or cancel the directory change.

error-modal.not-enough-space-text.message: It looks like there is not enough space on the disk containing the directory you selected. Please free up some space and try again or cancel the directory change.

error-modal.directory-move-generic-text.message: Revoria is unable to migrate to the new directory you selected. Please contact support for help or cancel the directory change.

error-modal.minecraft-sign-in-text-start.message: To play this instance, you must sign in through Microsoft below. If you don't have a Minecraft account, you can purchase the game on the

error-modal.state-init-text.message: Revoria failed to load correctly. This may be because of a corrupted file, or because the app is missing crucial files.

error-modal.state-init-fix-ways.message: You may be able to fix it through one of the following ways:

error-modal.state-init-fix-internet.message: Ensuring you are connected to the internet, then try restarting the app.

error-modal.no-loader-text.message: Revoria failed to find the loader version for this instance.

error-modal.no-loader-repair-text.message: To resolve this, you need to repair the instance. Click the button below to do so.

error-modal.debug-help-text-start.message: If nothing is working and you need help, visit

error-modal.debug-help-text-end.message: and start a chat using the widget in the bottom right and we will be more than happy to assist! Make sure to provide the following debug information to the agent:

error-modal.migration.text-1.message: We've detected a problem with our database migration system caused by inconsistent line endings between operating systems (Windows vs. macOS/Linux). This may affect app stability.

error-modal.migration.text-2.message: What’s happening? Our migration validator misreads modified migrations when line endings differ (CRLF ↔ LF), which can make the app unusable.

error-modal.migration.text-3.message: Why? Git’s automatic line-ending conversions and OS differences can cause these inconsistencies during builds.

error-modal.migration.text-4.message: What’s next? We’re working on a permanent fix. In the meantime, you can apply one of the quick fixes below depending on your system.

error-modal.migration.need-fix-now.message: Do I need to apply a fix now?

error-modal.migration.help-text.message: If you are encountering an error while applying migrations, such as "Error while applying migrations: migration XXXXXXXXXX was previously applied but has been modified", or a similar issue with migration, the following actions might help:

error-modal.migration.backup-text.message: If none of the above steps help, you can try saving a copy of the file app.db to a safe location, such as %appdata%\Roaming\Revoria on Windows or ~/Library/Application Support/Revoria on macOS, then deleting the original file and letting the app re-create the database file. Note that this may cause data loss inside the app, so make sure to back up your launcher data before applying these fixes.

error-modal.migration.fix-unix-title.message: Convert all line endings in migration files to LF (Unix-style: \n)

error-modal.migration.fix-windows-title.message: Convert all line endings in migration files to CRLF (Windows-style: \r\n)

error-modal.migration.fix-unix-button.message: Apply fix for Unix like systems (Debian, Ubuntu, macOS and others)

error-modal.migration.fix-success.message: ✅ The migration fix has been applied successfully. Please restart the launcher and try to log in to the game :)

error-modal.migration.fix-failed.message: ❌ The migration fix failed or had no effect.

error-modal.migration.try-other-fix.message: If the problem persists, please try the other fix.

syncing.description.message: Share one real folder or file across all instances.

syncing.how-it-works.message: When enabled, existing data is moved into the shared sync folder and each instance path is replaced with a link.

syncing.shared-folder-hint.message: This folder stores the real shared files and folders.

syncing.conflicts-hint.message: Conflicts mean some instances still have separate data at that path.
